title: Clone Pokemon [Cobblemon]
description: Clone Pokemon variant forms for Cobblemon, Bulbasaur, Ivysaur, Venusaur, Charmander, Charmeleon, Charizard, Squirtle, Wartortle, Blastoise
body:
Pokemon Clones for Cobblemon

 

 Dependencies:

This addon NEEDS to be placed in the DATAPACK FOLDER within your world folder. and RESOURCEPACK FOLDER within minecraft.

 

 

 

OTHER MODS REQUIRED:

  • cobblemon.

 

Clone versions of the starter Pokemon for the Cobblemon Mod. This also includes shiny variants.

 

In this pack i made a version of the kanto starter trio, in the aesthetic of the cloned pokemon from the original pokemon movie.

these skins are made to fit the cobblemon theme and models. and even include the shiny variants of those starter pokemon. 

 

These skins DO NOT replace the normal variants. these clones would spawn in the same biomes with the same rarity as the originals.

 

 

 

Pokemon with clone variants (so far):
  1. Bulbasaur
  2. Ivysaur
  3. Venusaur
  4. Squirtle
  5. Wartortle
  6. Blastoise
  7. Charmander
  8. Charmeleon
  9. Charizard

 

Command to spawn a clone would be as shown below.

/pokespawn bulbasaur clone
